name: tooltip
title: Tooltip
description: Compact and detailed labels on hover and focus.

api.description: Compact or detailed labels on hover, focus, or a viewport point. Compose Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, and TooltipContent. Point mode uses anchorPoint and omits TooltipTrigger.

props.name: variant
props.description: Content density and typography.

props.name: appearance
props.description: Panel surface color. inverse uses a dark tip on light pages and a light tip on dark pages; light and dark lock one surface.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Initial open state when uncontrolled.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called when open state changes.

props.name: delayDuration
props.description: Hover delay in milliseconds before showing.

props.name: anchorPoint
props.description: Viewport point to anchor the tip when there is no trigger. Use with controlled open.

props.name: dismissDuration
props.description: Auto-hide duration in milliseconds while open. When omitted in point mode, uses --df-duration-tip-hold.

props.name: render
props.description: Host element to attach tooltip behavior to.

props.name: children
props.description: Trigger content when not using render.

props.name: …button attributes
props.description: Applied when rendering the default button host.

props.name: side
props.description: Preferred placement side. Flips when there is not enough space.

props.name: align
props.description: Alignment along the side.

props.name: sideOffset
props.description: Gap between trigger and content.

props.name: alignOffset
props.description: Shift along the alignment axis.

props.name: wrap
props.description: For the detailed variant, wrap text within the max width.

props.name: arrow
props.description: Show the pointing arrow.

props.name: children
props.description: Tooltip label or detailed body.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-tooltip-max-width
props.description: Compact variant max width.

props.name: --df-tooltip-max-width-detailed
props.description: Detailed variant max width.

props.name: --df-tooltip-arrow-offset
props.description: Arrow distance from the content edge.

props.name: --df-tooltip-arrow-align-nudge
props.description: Arrow alignment nudge toward the trigger.

props.name: --df-duration-tip-hold
props.description: Default auto-hide duration for point-anchored tips.

props.name: --df-shadow-tooltip
props.description: Drop shadow that includes the arrow silhouette.

props.name: --popover
props.description: Tip fill. Remapped by appearance (inverse, light, or dark).

props.name: --popover-foreground
props.description: Tip text color. Remapped by appearance.

props.name: --foreground
props.description: Used for the tip border mix. Remapped by appearance.
